summary: Iteration 6 testing completed successfully. All requested features verified: AdminPortfolios list with profit accrual info, AdminPortfolioForm separate page with 4 tabs, dynamic durations with individual rates, contract template selection with auto-translate button, translate API via Gemini 3 Flash, InvestPage canvas-only signature, and PDF generation with DejaVuSans Cyrillic font.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint working
Backend: Admin login with session_token
Backend: GET /api/admin/portfolios - returns portfolios with profit_accrual_interval and profit_accrual_time
Backend: POST /api/admin/portfolios - creates portfolio with dynamic durations and duration_unit
Backend: POST /api/translate - requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: POST /api/translate - translates Russian to Kazakh and English via Gemini 3 Flash
Backend: Translation preserves placeholders like {{contract_id}}
Backend: GET /api/admin/contract-templates - returns 2 templates
Backend: GET /api/portfolios - returns 6 active portfolios
Backend: GET /api/investments/{id}/contract - generates PDF with DejaVuSans font (Cyrillic support)
Backend: POST /api/investments - creates investment with canvas signature_type
Frontend: AdminPortfolios page loads at /admin/portfolios
Frontend: Portfolio list shows profit accrual info (Начисление: Еженедельно в 12:00)
Frontend: 'Создать портфель' button navigates to /admin/portfolios/create
Frontend: AdminPortfolioForm has 4 tabs: Основное, Доходность, Презентация, Договор
Frontend: 'Доходность' tab shows duration unit selector (Единица срока: Месяцы)
Frontend: 'Доходность' tab shows dynamic durations with individual rates
Frontend: 'Добавить срок' button available for adding new durations
Frontend: Profit accrual settings section with interval dropdown and time input
Frontend: Example calculation display (При доходности 12% годовых и ежемесячном начислении = 1.00%/месяц)
Frontend: 'Договор' tab shows template selector (Выбор шаблона договора)
Frontend: 'Автоперевод на KZ/EN' button present
Frontend: Contract text tabs: Русский*, Қазақша, English
Frontend: Available variables section with {{contract_id}}, {{client_name}}, etc.
Frontend: InvestPage 4-step flow (Параметры→Условия→Подписание→Подтверждение)
Frontend: InvestPage Step 3 shows canvas signature ONLY (no text signature tab)
Frontend: Canvas signature drawing works correctly
Frontend: 'Очистить' (Clear) button available for canvas
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test portfolio with dynamic durations during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 features verified working: 1) AdminPortfolios at /admin/portfolios shows portfolio list with profit accrual info. 2) AdminPortfolioForm at /admin/portfolios/create is a separate page with 4 tabs (Основное, Доходность, Презентация, Договор). 3) 'Доходность' tab has duration_unit selector, dynamic durations with individual rates, 'Добавить срок' button, and profit accrual settings. 4) 'Договор' tab has template selector and 'Автоперевод на KZ/EN' button that calls POST /api/translate. 5) Translation API uses Gemini 3 Flash via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY and preserves placeholders. 6) InvestPage canvas signature is graphical only (no text signature tab). 7) PDF generation uses DejaVuSans font for Cyrillic support.

components: Portfolio list with profit accrual info display
Stats cards: Всего портфелей, На главной, Активные, Ср. доходность
Each portfolio shows: Доходность, Сроки, Сумма, Начисление
Action buttons: Star (featured), Eye (view), Edit, Delete
Separate page (not modal) for portfolio creation
Back button to return to portfolio list
Dynamic durations list with individual rates
'Добавить срок' button to add new duration
Contract text section with language tabs (Русский*, Қазақша, English)

features: Translates Russian to Kazakh and English

components: Step 3: Canvas signature ONLY (no text signature tab)
Instruction: 'Нарисуйте вашу подпись в поле ниже'
Hint: 'Используйте мышь или касание для рисования подписи'

features: Company signature and stamp from admin_settings
